summary: Iteration 37: Verified Value Framework (VF) mock-up integration. All features working correctly - VF seed questions appear in discovery sections, follow-up questions trigger on answer, framing messages display, answers persist via save.
passed_tests: 1. GET /api/value-framework returns 3 categories (optimize, accelerate, protect) - PASS
2. Each VF category has discovery_questions with id, question, tags - PASS
3. VF seed questions appear in IPAM section (N tag mapping) - PASS
4. VF seed questions show Optimize badge for optimize category - PASS
5. Answering seed question triggers follow-up questions - PASS
6. Follow-up questions show contextual framing messages - PASS
7. Value Discovery accordion shows answered count (1/2) and follow-up count (+2 follow-ups) - PASS
8. VF answers stored in discovery context (vf-opt-1 persisted) - PASS
9. Save functionality works - toast 'Saved - All changes saved successfully' - PASS
10. Navigation pills work - clicking Security pill scrolls to Security section - PASS
11. Section collapse/expand works - clicking header toggles visibility - PASS
12. Scroll-spy updates active nav pill on scroll - PASS
13. VF seed questions appear in Internal DNS section (N tag) - PASS
14. VF seed questions appear in Security section (S tag) with Proactively badge - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: ValueFrameworkInjection.jsx: TAG_TO_SECTIONS mapping correctly maps N→IPAM/DNS/DHCP, C→Cloud/Services, S→Security
ValueFrameworkInjection.jsx: FOLLOW_UPS object defines contextual follow-ups with framing messages for each seed question
ValueFrameworkInjection.jsx: getSeedQuestionsForSection() picks max 2 seeds per section, preferring questions with follow-ups
ValueFrameworkInjection.jsx: Follow-ups only appear when seed question has non-empty answer (hasAnswer check)
AssessmentQuestions.jsx: ValueFrameworkInjection rendered at top of each section (line 892)
Backend ai.py: /api/value-framework endpoint returns VALUE_FRAMEWORK data structure
Backend valueFramework.py: Contains 3 categories with discovery_questions, before_scenarios, infoblox_solves, positive_outcomes, key_metrics
context_for_next_testing_agent: Value Framework mock-up fully verified. Key behaviors: (1) VF seed questions injected into discovery sections based on tag mapping (N=Network sections, C=Cloud sections, S=Security). (2) Answering a seed question reveals follow-up questions with contextual framing text. (3) Value Discovery accordion shows progress (answered/total) and follow-up count. (4) VF answers stored in discovery context with vf- prefix (e.g., vf-opt-1). (5) Save persists VF answers to backend. Key selectors: [data-testid='vf-injection-SECTION'], [data-testid='vf-seed-input-vf-opt-1'], [data-testid='vf-followup-vf-fu-opt-1a'].

follow_up_questions.framing_messages: Contextual text explaining why follow-up is relevant
follow_up_questions.example_framing: Understanding your cloud footprint helps size the right deployment model.

navigation_pills.scroll_spy: IntersectionObserver auto-updates active pill on scroll
navigation_pills.click_behavior: Scrolls to section and expands if collapsed
